title: Harden Dynamic Resource Allocation in Your Cluster — Grant multi-node controller permissions only when needed
text:
Use
arbitrary-node:*
only for components that must update from any node:
apiVersion
:
rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind
:
ClusterRole
metadata
:
name
:
dra-multinode-status-updater
rules
:
-
apiGroups
:
[
"resource.k8s.io"
]
resources
:
[
"resourceclaims/status"
]
verbs
:
[
"get"
,
"patch"
,
"update"
]
-
apiGroups
:
[
"resource.k8s.io"
]
resources
:
[
"resourceclaims/driver"
]
verbs
:
[
"arbitrary-node:patch"
,
"arbitrary-node:update"
]
resourceNames
:
[
"dra.example.com"
]
